The philosophy and purpose behind this project

This project exists to provide a simple, structured way to record and review patterns in a cycle.

Many people find it difficult to apply general information in daily life. Bodies change over time, and factors such as stress, illness, travel, and changes in routine can affect patterns in ways that are not always predictable.

This application is designed as a focused tool for daily observation and long-term review. It allows users to record what they notice and look back over time to better understand how things change.

The goal is not to provide predictions, guarantees, or medical conclusions. The goal is to support awareness and careful observation.

## The product is intentionally built to be:

- Simple
- Conservative in its conclusions
- Clear about what it shows and what it does not claim

This application does not provide medical advice and is not a substitute for professional healthcare. Any decisions made using the information remain the responsibility of the user.

Some people may use a tool like this for a short time, others for longer, and some may return to it during different phases of life. That is expected.

Because this type of information is personal, privacy and data control are treated as core principles of the product.

This project is developed with a long-term perspective, with an emphasis on reliability, restraint, and respect for the complexity of the human body.

By using this application, you agree to the following terms.

## Nature of the service

This application is an informational and record-keeping tool.

It:

- Does not provide medical advice
- Does not provide diagnoses
- Does not guarantee outcomes
- Does not replace professional healthcare

Any decisions you make based on the information provided by the application are your own responsibility.

## No guarantees

The application makes no guarantees about:

- Accuracy in all situations
- Outcomes or results
- Suitability for any specific purpose

Biological systems are complex and variable. The application reflects available information but cannot account for all circumstances.

## User responsibility

You are responsible for:

- The information you enter
- How you interpret and use the information shown
- Any decisions you make based on it

## Availability of the service

The service is provided on a best-effort basis. There may be interruptions, changes, or discontinuation of features over time.

## Accounts and access

You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account access. You should not share access with others unless a feature explicitly supports it.

## Limitation of liability

To the extent permitted by law, the creators and operators of this application are not liable for any direct or indirect consequences arising from the use of, or inability to use, the service.

## Changes to the service or terms

The service and these terms may change over time. Continued use of the application after changes means you accept the updated terms.

Changes to the service or terms
How we handle your personal health information

Your data belongs to you.

This application is built around a simple principle: information about your body is personal, and it should remain under your control.

## Data minimization

We intentionally collect as little personal information as possible.

The application does not ask for, and does not store:

- Your name
- Your date of birth
- Your age
- Your location
- Your gender
- Any demographic information
- Any profile information that describes who you are

There is no personal profile in the traditional sense.

Your account is identified only by the minimum technical information required for access (for example, an email address or login identifier).

## What data is stored

The application stores only:

- The information you choose to enter (such as daily observations and cycle-related entries)
- The minimum technical data required to keep your account and subscription working

No additional personal or demographic data is collected.

## How your data is used

Your data is used only to:

- Show you your own records
- Calculate and display results inside the app
- Provide the features you choose to use

Your data is not:

- Sold
- Rented
- Shared with advertisers
- Used for advertising
- Used for tracking across other websites or apps
- Used to build marketing or behavioral profiles

## No identity profiling

Because we do not collect demographic or identifying profile information, your data is not used to build any kind of personal profile about you.

The data you enter exists only to serve the function of the application for you.

## Access and control

You remain in control of your data at all times.

- You can delete your data from within the app
- You can stop using the service at any time
- When data is deleted, it is removed from active systems

## Third-party services

Some infrastructure services (such as hosting, email delivery, or payments) may process limited technical data as required to operate the service.

These providers are used only to run the application and are not allowed to use your data for their own purposes.

No third party is given access to your personal health data for advertising, marketing, or profiling.

## Security

Reasonable technical and organizational measures are taken to protect your data. No system can guarantee absolute security, but this information is treated with appropriate care.

## Changes

If this policy changes, the updated version will be published in the app or on the website.
